Table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT2

Card of table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT2

Name

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT2

Code

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT2

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT2

---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

WITH CleanedProductCatalog AS (

SELECT

MD5(

COALESCE(EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(TO_VARCHAR(__LOAD_TS), '-1')

) AS MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY,

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,

FROM (

SELECT

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,

__LOAD_TS,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

ORDER BY __LOAD_TS DESC

) AS rn

FROM DB_CONS_STG_QAS.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG

)

WHERE rn = 1

),

RankedVariants AS (

SELECT

MD5(

COALESCE(c.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(c.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(c.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, '-1')||

COALESCE(TO_VARCHAR(__LOAD_TS), '-1')

) AS MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY,

pcv.MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY,

c.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE as COUNTRY_CODE_BK,

c.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE as PRODUCT_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_ACTUALCONTENTUNITS AS VARIANT_ACTUAL_CONTENT_UNIT,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_APPROVALSTATUSCODE AS VARIANT_APPROVAL_STATUS_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_BRAND_BRANDCODE AS VARIANT_BRAND_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_BRAND_BRANDDESCRIPTIONS_EN AS VARIANT_BRAND_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_BRAND_BRANDFAMILYNAME AS VARIANT_BRAND_FAMILY_NAME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_BRAND_EXTERNALBRANDCODE AS VARIANT_EXTERNAL_BRAND_CODE,

c.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE AS VARIANT_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_COLOR_CODE AS VARIANT_COLOR_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_COLOR_COLORGROUPDATA_CODE AS VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_COLOR_COLORGROUPDATA_HEXCODE AS VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_HEX_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_COLOR_COLORGROUPDATA_NAME_EN AS VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_NAME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_COLOR_DESCRIPTION_EN AS VARIANT_COLOR_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_COLOR_HEXCODE AS VARIANT_COLOR_HEX_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_COMINGSOON AS VARIANT_COMING_SOON_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_DEFAULTCATEGORY_CODE AS VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_DEFAULTCATEGORY_DESCRIPTION_EN AS VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_DEFAULTCATEGORY_EXTERNALCODE AS VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_EXTERNAL_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_DESCRIPTION_EN AS VARIANT_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_DEVICEVERSION AS VARIANT_DEVICE_VERSION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_EAN AS VARIANT_EAN,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_EDITION_EN AS VARIANT_EDITION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_FLAVOUR_EN AS VARIANT_FLAVOUR,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_ISPRODUCTSHIPPABLE AS VARIANT_PRODUCT_SHIPPABLE_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_ISREDEMPTIONELIGIBLE AS VARIANT_REDEMPTION_ELIGIBLE_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_ISREVIEWABLE AS VARIANT_REVIEWABLE_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_ISREWARDELIGIBLE AS VARIANT_REWARD_ELIGIBLE_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_ISSOLDINDIVIDUALLY AS VARIANT_SOLD_INDIVIDUALLY_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_ISVISIBLEONLYAFTERHAV AS VARIANT_HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_VISIBILITY_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_MAXORDERQUANTITY AS VARIANT_MAX_ORDER_QUANTITY,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_MINORDERQUANTITY AS VARIANT_MIN_ORDER_QUANTITY,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_MODEL AS VARIANT_MODEL,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_NAME_EN AS VARIANT_NAME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_NICOTINELEVEL_EN AS VARIANT_NICOTINE_LEVEL,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_NUMBERCONTENTUNITS AS VARIANT_NUMBER_CONTENT_UNIT,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_OFFLINEDATE AS VARIANT_OFFLINE_DATE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_ONLINEDATE AS VARIANT_ONLINE_DATE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PLATFORM AS VARIANT_PLATFORM,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PMIPRODUCTCATEGORY AS VARIANT_PMI_PRODUCT_CATEGORY,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PMIPRODUCTCODE AS VARIANT_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PMISELLABLEPRODUCTCODE AS VARIANT_PMI_SELLABLE_PRODUCT_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PREORDERDATEUNTIL AS VARIANT_PRE_ORDER_END_DATE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRICEQUANTITY AS VARIANT_PRICE_QUANTITY,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRODUCTDETAILS_EN AS VARIANT_PRODUCT_DETAIL,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRODUCTURL AS VARIANT_PRODUCT_URL,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PUFFS_EN AS VARIANT_PUFF,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_REDEMPTIONPOINTS AS VARIANT_REDEMPTION_POINT,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_SEODESCRIPTION_EN AS VARIANT_SEO_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_SEOTITLE_EN AS VARIANT_SEO_TITLE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_SEOURL_EN AS VARIANT_SEO_URL,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_SHORTDESCRIPTION_EN AS VARIANT_SHORT_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_STATUSPOINTS AS VARIANT_STATUS_POINT,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_SUBJECTEDTOREGISTRATION AS VARIANT_SUBJECTED_TO_REGISTRATION_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TANKSIZE AS VARIANT_TANK_SIZE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TECHNICALDETAILS_EN AS VARIANT_TECHNICAL_DETAIL,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TYPE AS VARIANT_TYPE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_UNIT_CODE AS VARIANT_UNIT_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_UNIT_DESCRIPTION_EN AS VARIANT_UNIT_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_VEEVTANKSIZE_EN AS VARIANT_VEEV_TANK_SIZE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_WARRANTYINFORMATION_EN AS VARIANT_WARRANTY_INFORMATION,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY

c.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

c.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,

c.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE,

c.__LOAD_TS

ORDER BY c.__LOAD_TS DESC

) AS row_priority

FROM DB_CONS_STG_QAS.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG c

LEFT JOIN CleanedProductCatalog pcv

ON c.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE = pcv.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE

AND c.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE = pcv.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

WHERE c.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE IS NOT NULL

)

SELECT *

FROM RankedVariants

WHERE row_priority = 1

;

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE,EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, __LOAD_TS

Primary key(s) Target: PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

based on COUNTRY_CODE_BK (events_country_code)

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT2

CKT_MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIAN


Server validation rule of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT2

%RULES%


Code preview of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT2

drop table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT2 cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT2
--==============================================================
create or replace table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT2 (

);

alter table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT2 set comment = 'Master data entity describing a specific variant of a product, such as color, size, or nicotine level, including its distinct product variant code, descriptive attributes, category, technical details, and variant-specific regulatory or commercial flags.';
